## Summary
- What changed?
- Why is this needed?

## Validation
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `pytest tests -q`
- [ ] Docker build validated
- [ ] Screenshots / output attached if relevant

## Release impact
- [ ] Safe for `dev`
- [ ] Candidate for `qa`
- [ ] Needs `preprod` validation
- [ ] Requires production approval

## Docs and changelog
- [ ] README / docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Release notes entry considered
